Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Outfi: Comma-separated list of outfit names used when spawning the boss zombie. Each must match a registered outfit (e.g. Nemesis,MrX).
Comma-separated percentages controlling how likely each outfit is to be picked. Must match the outfit list order (e.g. 50,50). Missing values default to 0.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Press: How much spawn pressure accumulates each game minute while no boss is active. Higher values make the boss appear sooner. Default: 3.
The pressure value that must be reached before a spawn roll can occur. Higher values delay the first possible spawn. Default: 30.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Spawn: Percentage chance each minute (after threshold is met) that the boss actually spawns. Lower values make spawns less predictable. Default: 10.
Minimum tile distance from the target player where the boss can spawn. Default: 30.
Maximum tile distance from the target player where the boss can spawn. Default: 45.
Number of random locations tried to find a valid spawn square. Increase if boss fails to spawn in dense areas. Default: 24.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_BossM: Number of hits the boss can absorb before taking actual damage. Higher values make the boss harder to kill. Default: 10.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Debug: Enable debug messages in the server console. Useful for troubleshooting spawn behavior. Default: off.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Detec: Distance in tiles at which the Nemesis is detected and tracked by the client. Also controls when sounds and redirect start. Default: 80.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Theme: Distance in tiles at which the looping theme music begins playing on the Nemesis zombie. Default: 60.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Stars: Distance in tiles at which the STARS announcement plays when the Nemesis is first detected nearby. Default: 40.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_RoarC: Minimum time in seconds between roar sound checks. Default: 8.
Percentage chance that the Nemesis roars each cooldown cycle. 0 disables roars. Default: 40.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Grunt: Percentage chance that the Nemesis grunts when hit by a weapon. 0 disables grunts. Default: 50.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Redir: How often in seconds the owning client re-issues a pathfind command to direct the Nemesis toward the nearest player. Lower values make the Nemesis track more aggressively. Default: 5.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_BossC: After the boss spawns near a player, that player is protected from being targeted again for this many spawn cycles. 0 disables the cooldown. Default: 3.
Sandbox_ApocalipseBrProjetoNemesis_Coold: When enabled, the cooldown duration increases based on the number of online players. The extra cycles are calculated as (online players × Cooldown Per Player). Default: off.
Extra cooldown cycles added per online player when scaling is enabled. For example, with 4 players online and this set to 1, the cooldown increases by 4 cycles. Default: 1.
